/bin/zsh -lc "export PYTHONPATH=/Users/kevin/code/storyteller/backend && export STORYTELLER_DATABASE_URL=postgresql+psycopg://storyteller:storyteller@localhost:8567/storyteller && export STORYTELLER_SECRETS_FILE='' && python - <<'PY'
from app.db.session import get_engine, get_session_factory
from app.services.catalog import CATALOG_FILE_PATH, load_catalog_document, seed_catalog
from app.services.sessions import SessionService
from app.services import (
    BeatSheetGenerationService,
    BriefNormalizationService,
    CharacterGenerationService,
    PitchGenerationService,
    StoryWorkflowToolService,
)
from app.models import StoryWorkflowToolName
from tests.test_session_api import (
    StubBeatSheetGenerationAdapter,
    StubBriefNormalizationAdapter,
    StubCharacterGenerationAdapter,
    StubPitchGenerationAdapter,
)

get_engine.cache_clear()
get_session_factory.cache_clear()
session_factory = get_session_factory()

with session_factory() as session:
    seed_catalog(session, load_catalog_document(CATALOG_FILE_PATH))

with session_factory() as session:
    service = SessionService(
        session,
        brief_normalization_service=BriefNormalizationService(
            adapter=StubBriefNormalizationAdapter()
        ),
    )
    created = service.create_session(working_title='QA Composition Stream')
    session_id = created.id
    service.select_genre(session_id, genre_slug='quest-fantasy', origin='workspace')
    service.select_tone(session_id, tone_profile_slug='hushed-wonder', origin='workspace')
    service.save_story_brief(
        session_id,
        raw_brief='A harbor child follows a drifting bell across moonlit water and brings the night back to calm.',
        origin='workspace',
    )
    pitch_response = service.generate_pitches(
        session_id,
        candidate_count=3,
        origin='workspace',
        pitch_generation_service=PitchGenerationService(
            adapter=StubPitchGenerationAdapter()
        ),
    )
    pitch_id = pitch_response.snapshot.pitch_batches[0].pitches[0].id
    service.select_pitch(session_id, pitch_id=pitch_id, origin='workspace')
    character_response = service.generate_character_sheets(
        session_id,
        candidate_count=2,
        origin='workspace',
        character_generation_service=CharacterGenerationService(
            adapter=StubCharacterGenerationAdapter()
        ),
    )
    character_id = character_response.snapshot.character_sheet_batches[0].character_sheets[0].id
    service.select_character_sheet(
        session_id,
        character_sheet_id=character_id,
        origin='workspace',
    )
    beat_response = service.generate_beat_sheet(
        session_id,
        origin='workspace',
        beat_sheet_generation_service=BeatSheetGenerationService(
            adapter=StubBeatSheetGenerationAdapter()
        ),
    )
    beat_id = beat_response.snapshot.beat_sheet_revisions[0].id
    service.select_beat_sheet(session_id, beat_sheet_id=beat_id, origin='workspace')
    StoryWorkflowToolService(session).execute(
        tool_name=StoryWorkflowToolName.UPDATE_SETUP_HEURISTICS,
        session_id=session_id,
        arguments={
            'target_word_count': 1800,
            'target_runtime_minutes': 12,
            'chapter_count': 3,
            'approximate_scene_count': 8,
            'guidance_notes': 'Let each chapter land calmer than it began.',
            'origin': 'workspace',
        },
    )
    composition = StoryWorkflowToolService(session).execute(
        tool_name=StoryWorkflowToolName.COMPOSE_NEXT_SEGMENT,
        session_id=session_id,
        arguments={'origin': 'workspace'},
    )
    print(session_id)
    print(composition.composition_job_id)
PY"
